\se[22-nb]And so you know~? Wuh, \n[2], are you listening~?
This is a piece of my dark past.
It took place just a bit before me and Shino became a temp couple.
Looking back, I really made quite the ridiculous request back then.
I wanted a picture of... Rino nee-san, the girl I admire so much.
I asked her if she'd let me take a photo of her, in her loungewear.
It was nothing but a boy in puberty going wild.
I came to the moment I finished making the request.
As if she'd let me do it... and all.
But then, just as I was about to frantically take it back--
Rino nee-san, who was quite drunk, thought deeply...
\se[20-nb]Nnnn, well, you're a boy of age too, aren't you, \n[2]? Sure.
But, let's not tell Shino-chan about this, okay?
While shocked that I got permission, I knew that I'd never get another chance
like this, and so I took a photo from the front, with my tembling hands.
Her cleavage, almost spilling out of her loose shirt, was
so well emphasized, it made me incredibly horny.
As I stared at that image for a few moments...
\SE[11-nb]Hey, are you sure that's all you want...?
Rino nee-san smiled bewitchingly... and twisted her body in my direction.
It was a lascivious smile... enough to put me in a daze just looking at it.
With trembling hands, I pressed the shutter button once again.
-- Did you, get a good one?
That photo, a much clearer one, taken from a much closer distance,
is still stored within my secret treasure folder.
This was my dark past, and also my greatest adventure.
